allow: Bash(node -e "try { JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('exams.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('JSON valid'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('JSON error:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "try { const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('exams.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('valid. tnpsc subjects:', d.tnpsc.subjects.map\(s=>s.id\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('ssc subjects:', d.ssc.subjects.map\(s=>s.id\).join\(', '\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('JSON error:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const d = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('exams.json','utf8'\)\); const ca = d.tnpsc.subjects.find\(s=>s.id==='tnpsc-current-affairs'\); console.log\('CA icon:', ca.icon, 'label:', ca.label, 'color:', ca.color\); console.log\('CA nav items:', ca.navGroups[0].items.map\(i=>i.id\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('CA sections:', Object.keys\(ca.sections\).join\(', '\)\); const tests = d.tnpsc.subjects.find\(s=>s.id==='tnpsc-tests'\); console.log\('Tests sections:', Object.keys\(tests.sections\).join\(', '\)\);")
